overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in Western attire walking through a forested canyon trail, approaching a river, and wading through it. The environment features rocky cliffs, dense vegetation, and dynamic lighting with storm clouds gathering in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested canyon trail between rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow dirt trail winding through a rocky canyon with dense vegetation

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock texture
sloped rocky hillside with scattered boulders
narrow winding dirt path with small rocks and patches of grass
tall evergreen trees with thick trunks and needle foliage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by rocky cliff faces on the left and forested slopes on the right. The canyon is densely vegetated with pine trees and undergrowth, with limited sky visibility through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: open riverside meadow with grassy banks

events.description: camera passes through dense tall grass and foliage, temporarily obscuring the view
emerges from enclosed forest trail into open riverside area with wide sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy riverbank with the river visible to the left, moving toward the water's edge

entered.detail: flowing river with visible current and rocky shoreline
lush green grass along the water's edge with wildflowers
massive weathered rock outcrop rising from the meadow

segments.scene_description: Passing through dense foliage, the scene opens into a wide riverside meadow. The river flows prominently on the left while the character walks along the grassy bank. Large rock formations rise in the distance under a partly cloudy sky with storm clouds gathering on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky riverbed

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into the river, transitioning from walking to wading

agents.ego_description: wading through the river water, moving against the current toward the opposite rocky shore

entered.detail: flowing water surface with ripples and reflections, now the primary ground plane
rocky riverbank with large boulders and pebble shore where the character exits

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and wades through the flowing water, which becomes the dominant surface. The rocky shore of the opposite bank becomes the new destination while the previous grassy bank recedes. The water creates ripples and splashes as the character moves toward the exit point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic canyon trail that gradually opens into a wide river crossing. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path enclosed by towering rocky cliffs and dense pine forests that limit the view of the sky. As the character pushes through the thick foliage, the scene expands into a broad riverside meadow where the horizon opens up to reveal distant rock formations and gathering storm clouds. The camera then follows the character as they leave the grassy bank and enter the flowing river, shifting the focus to the ripples and splashes of the water. Finally, the perspective moves across the current toward the rocky shore of the opposite bank as the meadow recedes behind them.
